speckit.name: Full SDD Cycle
speckit.description: Runs specify → plan → tasks → implement with review gates
speckit.author: GitHub

ai-team-sdd.name: AI Team SDD Cycle
ai-team-sdd.description: Runs enterprise AI Team SDD with native Spec Kit commands, plan-check command, composite task/evidence via preset, durable task context, and code graph impact
ai-team-sdd.author: AI Team Template

ai-team-intake.name: AI Team Plain-Language Intake
ai-team-intake.description: Turns a request without a work item into read-only impact evidence, a reviewed issue, and a formal workflow handoff
ai-team-intake.author: AI Team Template

ai-team-bugfix.name: AI Team Bug Fix
ai-team-bugfix.description: Runs AI Team bug fix with task identity, impact review, bug lifecycle, and composite checks/evidence via preset on speckit.bug.test
ai-team-bugfix.author: AI Team Template
